equipmentMods.amulet: Killing a monster or hitting an elite/boss while Bloodlust is active has a 10% chance to give a stack of Life, increasing your Health by 1% per stack (stacks up to 100)
equipmentMods.belt: Static Charge: Static charge will now stay for an additional 0.6 seconds, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 5% per enemy inside Static Charge range.
equipmentMods.bracer: Gain base Damage equal to 1% of your maximum Health
equipmentMods.goblet: Static Charge: Gain charges by damaging foes. Each charge adds 1% lightning damage. At 100 charges, summon thunderbolts across the battlefield.
equipmentMods.helmet: Killing a monster or hitting an elite/boss has a 10% to trigger a Bloodlust effect, gain 5% crit damage, 2% armor and 0.35% movement speed per stack. Stacks up to 100, lasts 15 seconds.
equipmentMods.horn: Static Charge: Static Charge increase it's damaging radius by 20%. Thunderbolt have 33% chance to deal an additional 30% Damage base on Static Charge time.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain 20 maximum Health for each available potion
equipmentMods.trinket: Static Charge: Static charge will now stay for an additional 0.6 seconds, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 5% per enemy inside Static Charge range.
equipmentMods.boots: Gain 1 base Damage for every 50 of your highest stat
equipmentMods.ring1: Gain an additional 0.1% maximum Health from Life stacks, for every 50 of your highest stat
equipmentMods.ring2: Gain an additional 0.1% maximum Health from Life stacks, for every 50 of your highest stat
equipmentMods.weapon: Static Charge: Static charge will now stay for an additional 0.6 seconds, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 5% per enemy inside Static Charge range.

equipmentMods.amulet: Increased 10% chance to spawn a container when killing an elite.
equipmentMods.belt: Vortex: Each vortex spawn 2 small vortexes that deals 50% of the Vortex damage.
equipmentMods.bracer: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)
equipmentMods.goblet: Vortex: Each vortex spawn 2 small vortexes that deals 50% of the Vortex damage.
equipmentMods.helmet: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)
equipmentMods.horn: Vortex: When vortexes collide, they turn into a thunderstorm, that deals an additional 200%.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain 100 Armor for each available potion
equipmentMods.trinket: Vortex: When vortexes collide, they turn into a thunderstorm, that deals an additional 200%.
equipmentMods.boots: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)
equipmentMods.ring1: Secondary Ability now charges three times as fast.
equipmentMods.ring2: Secondary Ability now charges three times as fast.
equipmentMods.weapon: Vortex: When vortexes collide, they turn into a thunderstorm, that deals an additional 200%.

equipmentMods.amulet: If your attacks hit within 5 meters, gain extra 50% damage.
equipmentMods.bracer: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)
equipmentMods.goblet: Delusion of Zelkors: Mages' explosions now spawn fire spikes, dealing an additional 20% damage for every active mage.
equipmentMods.helmet: Increased 10% chance to spawn a container when killing an elite.
equipmentMods.horn: Delusion of Zelkors: Spawn three additional mages.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain 100 Armor for each available potion
equipmentMods.trinket: Delusion of Zelkors: Mages are no longer illusions and remain on the battlefield for an additional 1.5 seconds.
equipmentMods.boots: Increased 10% chance to spawn a container when killing an elite.

equipmentMods.amulet: Gain 5% Damage for each available potion
equipmentMods.belt: Eye of the Storm: Eye of the Storm grows larger by 57%.
equipmentMods.bracer: When mining a node, it explodes causing a wave of Lightning damage to enemies around it. Gain a 5% Lightning Damage bonus for 60 seconds, stacks up to 20.
equipmentMods.goblet: Chain Lightning: With each link, Chain Lightning does additional 40% damage.
equipmentMods.helmet: Killing an elite enemy will now have a 10% chance to spawn an Amadora Snail.
equipmentMods.horn: Chain Lightning: Chain lightning will link three additional times.
equipmentMods.trinket: Chain Lightning: Chain lightning will link three additional times.
equipmentMods.boots: Gain 1% Crit Chance per potion slot.
equipmentMods.ring1: Gain 1.5% Damage for every 10 essence available.

equipmentMods.belt: Arcane Orb: When Arcane orbs return to the player, it creates an Arcane burst, dealing 100% damage and a bonus +15% for every additional orb.
equipmentMods.goblet: Electric Dragons: For each dragon, all other dragons deals 95% increase damage.
equipmentMods.horn: Electric Dragons: Gain an additional Electric Dragon, increasing its damage radius by 60%.
equipmentMods.trinket: Electric Dragons: For each dragon, all other dragons deals 95% increase damage.

equipmentMods.goblet: Statische Aufladung: Erhalte Aufladungen, indem du Gegnern Schaden zufügst. Jede Ladung fügt 1 % Blitzschaden hinzu. Bei 100 Ladungen beschwörst du Blitze über dem Schlachtfeld.
equipmentMods.horn: Flammenregen: Wenn ein Meteor landet, erzeugt er einen Lavastrom, der Gegner kontinuierlich schädigt. Die Lava bleibt 0,5 Sekunden lang bestehen und verursacht den gleichen Schaden wie Flammenregen.
equipmentMods.trinket: Blood Dragons: The dragons jump towards the player, and deal bonus damage the closer they are to their target up to +100%.

equipmentMods.goblet: Lightning Plasma: Lightning Plasma stays for an additional 1.5 seconds and deals +55% damage.
